audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: all entry points enforce the 48-byte constraint before calling the C function. Language bindings provide type-level guarantees (Rust `Bytes48` is `[u8; 48]`, Go `Bytes48` is `[48]byte`) or explicit runtime validation (Python/Node.js check byte length before memcpy). The C function correctly assumes well-formed inputs because all callers guarantee this precondition.
